title: Pure Collagen for Dogs Powder 180g by Pat's Pet Kitchen | 100% Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides for Joint & Mobility Support, Skin Hydration and Healthy Gut | Unflavoured + Dissolvable | Includes Scoop
features: ★ CRITICAL JOINT SUPPORT & CARTILAGE MAINTENANCE: Your dog's essential joint structures, including tendons and ligaments, are composed of up to 90% collagen. Pat's Pet Kitchen Pure Collagen delivers highly absorbable Bioactive Collagen Peptides directly to these areas. These peptides provide the vital building blocks for healthy cartilage, helping to reduce stiffness, cushion joints, and maintain their structural integrity for long-term comfort and function.

★ ENHANCED MOBILITY & RENEWED PHYSICAL FREEDOM: Support your dog’s active life by directly addressing restricted movement. Our specific low molecular weight collagen peptides are optimised for absorption, aiding in the flexibility and strength of tendons and ligaments. This contributes to improved agility, easier movement, and a greater willingness to engage in daily activities.

★ PROMOTES A HEALTHY, HYDRATED COAT & RESILIENT SKIN: True coat health starts from within. Collagen is a primary structural protein in your dog's skin (which makes up part of the 30% of total body protein that is collagen). Supplementing with our Pure Collagen helps maintain skin elasticity and hydration, leading to a visibly healthier, more lustrous coat and robust skin barrier.

★ SUPPORTS OPTIMAL GUT HEALTH & DIGESTIVE INTEGRITY: Emerging understanding highlights collagen's role in maintaining a healthy gut lining. Our 100% Pure Hydrolysed Collagen Peptides provide amino acids that can contribute to the structural integrity of the intestinal wall, supporting healthy digestion and nutrient absorption – a foundational aspect of overall wellness.

★ ESSENTIAL FOR BONE STRENGTH & SKELETAL RESILIENCE: Collagen provides the critical protein matrix within bones, essential for their strength, density, and ability to withstand daily stresses. Our Pure Collagen contributes to this vital framework, supporting your dog’s skeletal health and overall structural robustness throughout their life.
description: Product Description Supports Joints & Tendons Our Bioactive Collagen Peptides support the metabolism of joint cartilage. This helps maintain connective tissues, reduces the chance of injury, and keeps your dog active and playful for longer. Promotes a Shiny Coat & Healthy Skin A true sign of inner health! Collagen helps hydrate the skin's dermal layer, which can improve skin elasticity, strengthen nails, and promote the growth of a soft, lustrous coat with less itching. Promotes Healthy Digestion A happy gut is a happy dog. The amino acid Glycine, found in collagen, helps to soothe the lining of the gut and supports a healthier, less agitated digestive system.
